text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hear something curious on my way home.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Blip! Blip! Blip!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We've got a bogey! I repeat: we've got a bogey!
Team Golshi, deploy immediately!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Roger! Let's go, Trainer! Boo-yah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, she promptly stuffs me into a
burlap sack and trundles me off...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We're in the right spot now! No doubt about it!
The air is ripe with mystery!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: The mystery around Nessie's existence, of course!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Chupacabras, mermaids, kappas—you name an
Unidentified Mysterious Animal, and Team
Golshi's confirmed it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Our rep as the best cryptid hunters around is on
the line! We're not going home tonight till we get
Nessie on camera!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now let's get cracking on a plan that'll draw it out
in the open!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea what's going on, but I don't have
much choice but to play along.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, that's literally the boring-est suggestion you
could've come up with! I'd rather watch paint dry!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If we wanna see Nessie, we've gotta show it we
really mean business! Unless we do air squats the
whole time or something, it'll never show its face!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Actually, you know what? You might be onto
something! Let our thrilling squat showdown
begin! C'mon, it's you and me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Lemme show you what the world's most awesome
quads can do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ten minutes later...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Nrghhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Twenty minutes later...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Arrrgh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thirty minutes later...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh, how about that? Apparently, these weeds
are edible if you boil them.
choice_data_list: What happened to our squat competition?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What competition? Anyway, let's grab some of
this purslane to cultivate at the academy so we
can make namul.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We secretly plant our harvested purslane in the
student council office's flower pot, but get in
major hot water when it's discovered...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! I like how you think! No one can resist a
neat dance number!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, hey! ♪ Shimmy on forward! And shimmy
on back! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's flashy little dance draws lots of
attention...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whoo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When she finishes, a large crowd has gathered
about.

text_block_list.name: Male Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Nice footwork and rhythm! Bravo!

text_block_list.name: Female Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Your energy is infectious!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, everyone! Wake up, Tracen Academy
dance club! It's time for us underdogs to rise up
and take back our thrones!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The spirit of Yamaoka lives in me! Today, we take
Japan! Tomorrow, the world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although no one has any idea what she's talking
about—myself included—the crowd gathered here
is moved to tears.
